name: maze of ducts. I'm totally confused
description: I'm in a maze of ducts. I'm totally confused
hints: Duct maze node. Most directions here loop to the same place.
EAST to room 27. WEST to room 26. All other directions (N/S/U/D) lead to room 30.
E→room 27, W→room 26, N/S/U/D→room 30. Heavy loop node - careful navigation needed.
